title: ATLAS · Key Event Markers
description: Shared key-event markers feed consumed by every 5Y chart in ATLAS (frontend-v1 spec §1.7). Each entry represents a discrete, dated event (election, RBI policy, budget, COVID, demonetisation, sector shock, global macro, corporate action) that should render as a vertical rule + hover label on historical charts. Stage 1: hand-curated JSON fixture at `frontend/mockups/fixtures/events.json`. Stage 2: backed by `/api/v1/global/events` (spec §15). Dates are ISO YYYY-MM-DD in implicit IST.

data_as_of.description: Date this fixture was generated (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, IST).

items.title: Event marker
items.description: A single key event. `date` is the calendar day the event is anchored to; `category` and `severity` drive the marker colour and stroke weight; `affects` scopes which charts the marker renders on.

date.description: Event date in ISO YYYY-MM-DD (IST implicit). Must be a valid calendar date.

category.description: Event taxonomy. Controls default marker colour and legend grouping. `rbi_policy` covers rate decisions (cuts, hikes, holds). `sector_shock` covers IT export bans, AQR, USFDA actions etc. `global_macro` covers Fed decisions, oil shocks, Russia-Ukraine, SVB.

severity.description: Marker emphasis. `critical` = page-defining (COVID lockdown, demonetisation). `high` = major rate/policy shift. `medium` = notable (budget, quarterly result boundary). `low` = contextual marker.

label.description: Short hover label rendered on the marker. Under 60 chars so it fits in a tooltip without wrapping.

description.description: Optional long-form context (1-2 sentences). Shown in expanded tooltip or side drawer. Under 300 chars.
examples: Nationwide lockdown imposed in response to COVID-19; markets gap down, Nifty 50 closes at 7610.

affects.description: Scope selector. A chart renders this marker if ANY of its entries match the chart's scope. Entries are enum-like strings: `global`, `india`, `sector:{slug}` (e.g. `sector:nifty_it`), or `stock:{symbol}` (e.g. `stock:RELIANCE`).

display_color.description: Optional override for the marker colour. 6-digit hex, `#` prefixed. When omitted the chart picks a colour from the category palette.

source_url.description: Optional provenance link (RBI press release, ECI result page, company filing).
